summary: Verified SDI XML parser fix: multiple DettaglioPagamento handling, fallback logic (Level 1: XML, Level 2: supplier, Level 3: default_30gg), and preview with calculated scadenze

CASO1_preview_2rate.description: POST /api/fatture-ricevute/preview-xml with XML with 2 DettaglioPagamento returns scadenze_origine='xml', 2 scadenze with complete schema

CASO2_preview_default_30gg.description: POST /api/fatture-ricevute/preview-xml with XML without DatiPagamento + unknown supplier returns scadenze_origine='default_30gg', 1 scadenza with data = data_documento + 30 days

CASO3_import_2rate.description: POST /api/fatture-ricevute/import-xml with XML 2 rate saves to DB with 2 scadenze, response includes scadenze_origine='xml' and scadenze_count=2

CASO4_import_default_30gg.description: POST /api/fatture-ricevute/import-xml with XML without payment saves with default_30gg, scadenze_origine='default_30gg', scadenze_count=1

CASO5_batch_import.description: POST /api/fatture-ricevute/import-xml-batch with 2 XML files imports both with correct scadenze

CASO6_schema_verification.description: Verified fattura with 2 rate has complete scadenze_pagamento schema: scadenza_id, numero_rata, totale_rate, importo, importo_residuo, importo_pagato, stato, modalita_pagamento, origine

CASO7_duplicate_detection.description: POST /api/fatture-ricevute/preview-xml with already imported fattura returns duplicata=true

cleanup.description: Test invoices (TEST-2RATE-001, TEST-NOPAG-001) cleaned up after tests

critical_code_review_comments: Code verified: _enrich_scadenze helper (lines 106-125) correctly enriches payment_calculator output with full schema
Code verified: parse_fattura_xml (lines 318-376) correctly extracts ALL DettaglioPagamento entries with enriched schema
Code verified: import-xml endpoint (lines 655-702) implements Level 1/2/3 fallback logic correctly
Code verified: preview-xml endpoint (lines 871-959) calculates scadenze with fallback and detects duplicates
context_for_next_testing_agent: SDI XML parser fix verified. All 7 cases pass: XML with 2 rate, XML without payment (default 30gg fallback), batch import, duplicate detection, and complete scadenze schema. Test files cleaned up after tests.
